summary: Comprehensive testing of Stripe subscription payments for surfer and photographer tiers completed. All 13 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI flows verified working correctly. Stripe checkout integration functioning properly in sandbox mode.
seed_data_creation: Used existing test accounts. Created additional test users during UI testing flow.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Subscription checkout feature fully implemented and tested. Stripe integration working in sandbox mode (sk_test_emergent). Free tier directly updates user and redirects to /feed. Paid tiers redirect to Stripe checkout with correct amounts. Success page verifies payment status and shows confirmation UI.

verified_features.surfer_free_tier_redirects_to_feed: PASS - Clicking Free tier updates user subscription and redirects to /feed
verified_features.surfer_paid_tier_redirects_to_stripe: PASS - Clicking Basic ($1.99) tier redirects to Stripe checkout with correct amount
verified_features.photographer_tier_redirects_to_stripe: PASS - Clicking Basic ($18) tier redirects to Stripe checkout with correct amount
verified_features.subscription_success_page_works: PASS - Shows success UI with 'Welcome Aboard!', plan badge, and 'Start Exploring' button
verified_features.api_subscriptions_checkout_paid_tier: PASS - Creates Stripe checkout session and returns checkout URL
verified_features.api_subscriptions_status_paid_pending: PASS - Returns status='unpaid' for unpaid sessions
verified_features.api_subscriptions_status_invalid: PASS - Returns 404 for invalid session IDs
verified_features.api_invalid_tier_returns_400: PASS - Returns 400 error for invalid tier IDs

stripe_integration_notes: Using Stripe test key (sk_test_emergent). Checkout sessions created successfully. Actual payment completion not tested (sandbox mode). Success/Cancel URLs properly configured with session_id and tier parameters.
